'''Team Kothlis''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] team that played for<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="EGtP&M">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> of [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]] in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3]], during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], they defeated<ref name="HNN" /> the planet<ref name="EGtP&M" /> of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell's]] [[Team Ord Mantell|team]] with a single point in the Cup's opening round. The [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo District]] edition of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] covered the result of the match in an article.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Kothlis was mentioned in ''Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round'' an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47]]'' on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref>
